titleStmt.title: SII 32, appendix, no. 2: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 2. (A.R. No. B of 2008-09.) TIRUCHCHENDUṞAI, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the jagati (south), central shrine, Chandraśēkhara temple.

This incomplete inscription records that Madhurāntaka Irukkuvēḷ alias Āditta Bhūti made a gift (dakshiṇai) of four vēli of land at Veṇbhūtaṅkuḍi in Uṟaiyūr- kuṟṟam, as a tax free dēvadāna to the god of the stone temple, at Tiruchchenduṟai in Īśānamaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam, for providing food offerings, (to the god) on the occasion of the first-feeding (annaprāyam) of his son Bhūti Parāntakan. The apportionment of the yield, from the land of four hundred kalam of paddy is detailed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 3 nāḷ 9 100Read nāḷ 3 100 2 10 5 maturāntaka Irukkuveḷāyiṉa Āditta pūtiyeṉ Eṉ makaṉ pūti parāntakaṉ Annaprāyañ cekiṉṟa Iṭattu dakṣiṇaiyāka piramateyam Īcāṉama
ṅkalattut tiruccentuṟaik kaṟṟaḷipparameśvarararkku Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu veṇpūtaṅkuṭi nilam nālu veliyum Uṭumpoṭi Āmai taviḻntatu Epperppaṭṭa nila(m)muṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟi kuṭinikkiya tevatāṉamāka niroṭu Aṭṭi Iṟaiyi
li cantirādittaval tevatāṉañ ceytu kalmel veṭṭuvittu kuṭutteṉ Ātittam pūtiyeṉ Inilattāl nivantam cellumpaṭi tiruvamitukku patakkāṟu kuttal paḻavarici ciṟukālaikkum Uccampotaikkum Āka cūlanāḻiyāl patiṉaṟu nāḻikku nicati nel Ainkuṟuṇi Irunāḻi Uriyā
ḻākkāḷRead uḻakkālpaṭi tiṅkaḷ patiṉmukkalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻi muḻakkāl paṭi Āṇṭuvarai nel ṉūṟṟuaimpattu Oṉpatiṉ kalaṉe Iru tūṇi patakkiṉāl nilam Oṉṟaraiye yoru mā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum tūpparuppu nāḻikku nel nāṉāḻiyum neyyamitu
muḻākkiṉāl nel mukkuṟuṇiyum carkkaraiyamitu Oṉpatiṉ palattāl nelkuṟuṇi Oru nāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu potu muṉṟukku nel Aṟu nāḻiyum kāyattukkum Uppukkum nel muṉṉāḻiyum tayiramitu potu nāḻiyāṉa paṭi muṉṉāḻiyāl nelkkuṟuṇi Oru nāḻiyum Āka
nicati nel tūṇip patakkeḻu nāḻiyāl patiṉmukkalaṉe patakkiru nāḻiyāṉapaṭi Āṇṭuvarai nel Irunūṟṟu Aṟukalaṉe mukkuṟuṇiyāl nilam Iraṇṭey Oru mākkāṇiyum kaṇavatiyārkku nicatippaṭi Appam Amitu ceyya Aricikku nel muṉṉāḻiyum neyyāḻākkukku
nilam Aṟumāvum tiruppali Arici patakkāṟu kuttal potu Iru nāḻiyāṉapaṭi Iraṇṭu potaikku Irunāḻiyāṉapaṭi Ivvūr nilam mukkakāṇi muṉtirikaiyāl nālkalaṉe Aṟunāḻiyumāka nel nāṉūṟṟu kkalattukkum nilam nālveliyum cūlakkālāl veli ṉūṟṟu kkala varicaiyāl Eṉ makaṉ pūti parāṉtakaṉ Aṉṉappirāyañ ceyta nāṉṟu I
Digital edition of SII 32, appendix, no. 2 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
